title: The California Artificial Intelligence Transparency Act will be a first-of-its-kind bill that would protect consumers by giving them the ability to determine if materials have been
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: The California Artificial Intelligence Transparency Act will protect consumers by giving them the ability to determine if materials have been generated by AI.
AI-generated images, audio, and video could be used for spreading political misinformation and creating deepfakes.
The bill will require large generative AI providers to watermark the images, videos, and audio created by their models.
The introduction of this legislation marks a significant step toward establishing clear guidelines for AI-generated products.
The Biden-Harris Administration secured voluntary commitments from leading AI companies to develop robust technical mechanisms to ensure users know when content is AI-generated.
California aims to take the lead in consumer protection in innovation and technology related to AI.
